1767230.name: Stratospiel
1767230.description:
Welcome to the next world

Stratospiel is a jam-packed powder keg of an action and turn-based RPG. You control a small child who awakens on a strange planet, all alone, with their memories gone. Face your fears and confront your enemies on your quest to discover the truth. And remember, nothing is ever truly as it seems.

Nutrition Facts

  • Hectic, fast-paced, turn-based battles - dodge & deflect enemy attacks to reduce damage, time your attacks to pack an extra punch

  • Equally hectic, equally fast action elements like movement, puzzles, and platforming

  • Choose to befriend or defeat your enemies. I'm not at liberty to disclose whether this has an impact on the story

  • Decaying public transit, Monday night trivia, and EXTREME EXERCISE

  • Somehow I managed to squeeze a pirate subplot in there

  • Lovable characters you can easily substitute for real-world friends

  • Built by one person: that personal touch you love so much

  • A soundtrack that sounds pretty good if I do say so myself

  • Beautiful pixel art made 100% by talented human artists

  • An occasional silly moment or two

  • An occasional serious moment or two

  • An occasional burger moment or two (I'm eating lunch as I type this)

  • Obligatory, out-of-place stealth sections that completely ruin the pacing of the game

  • Gubby
1767230.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
